title: Makefile: minor fix to reenable system tests
body:
PR #2259 removed the .install.gomega Makefile target but
didn't clean up two references to it. Do so now.

Also, when setting up GOPKGBASEDIR symlink, use -f (force)
flag; otherwise subsequent makes will fail.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@edsantiago: Cannot trigger testing until a trusted user reviews the PR and leaves an `/ok-to-test` message.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2284#issuecomment-461148294):

>@vrothberg PTAL


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
